sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 54

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 54:1
items.html: (to the question) The point below the Yesod, which did not move from there even at the time of Gadlut, as the Rav says on p. 770, Item 54 — now, at the time of Gadlut, when the Yesod rose and became the upper third of Tiferet, from the Chazeh [chest] upward, the point beneath it is found precisely at the place of the opening of the Chazeh. And this is the secret of the Butzina de-Kardinuta [the dark flame], whose place the Rav shows at the place of the Chazeh. Thus the Butzina de-Kardinuta is the portion of the Light of Malchut — that is, the part of Malchut that did not move from beneath the Yesod even after its Gadlut. (p. 777, Item 67)
